title: AntiFarmReloaded
description: AntiFarm Reloaded is an anti-farm plugin that blocks and prevents AFK mob farms, villager exploits, and automated resource generation across all major gameplay systems.
body:
**AntiFarm Reloaded** is a Spigot/Paper Minecraft server plugin designed for Survival servers to automatically **detect** and **block** farms that produce near infinite amount of certain items without player effort.

**Features:**

**Configurable Rules**

> Via the config file Server Owners have _**full control**_ over how the plugin works including per world disabling

**AFK Farming Prevention**
- Detects and blocks all known AFK farm methods, not just mob grinders.
- Covers crop farms, mob farms, spawner farms, and redstone-based automation.
- Prevents players from gaining resources passively without active gameplay.
  
**Automatic Farm Prevention**:
- Block cactus farms by preventing growth next to adjacent blocks
- Stop piston-based farms from breaking or moving farm blocks automatically
- Prevent water harvesting farms from automatically collecting crops
- Unlit Harvesting prevention: Prevent instant crop harvesting in insufficiently lit areas.
- Stop Endermen from stealing and dropping farm blocks
- Disable snow trail generation from snow golems to prevent snowball farms
- Prevent foxes from dropping sweet berries to stop automated berry farms
- Block infinite lava generation via dripstone

**Complete Control Over Villagers**:
- Prevent breeding, profession changes, and crop harvesting
- Disable trading (villagers & wandering traders)
- Stop iron golem spawning
- Adjust cure chances independently of difficulty
  
**Control Over Mob Farms**:
- Require players to deal a configurable damage percentage for loot and XP to drop
- Independently toggle item drops and XP drops
- Whitelist or blacklist specific mobs from protection

**Anti AFK Fish Farms**:
- Allow drops from custom death causes for plugin compatibility
- Detects and limits fishing farms by tracking catches per chunk
- Independently configure the maximum fish caught before the chunk is restricted
- Set a configurable cooldown per chunk before the limit resets
- Warn players when they hit the fishing limit with a fully customizable message

**Anti-Dispenser Farm**:
- Block dispensers from interacting with farm blocks using a fully configurable item blacklist
- Prevent automated sheep shearing via dispensers
- Supports blocking any item including bone meal, buckets, and more out of the box
- 
**Raid Farm Prevention**:
- Prevent automated raid farming by enforcing a configurable cooldown between raids

**Creature Product Limiter**:
- Limit froglight production from frogs, requiring players to hand-feed them to continue producing
- Limit egg production from chickens, requiring players to hand-feed them with wheat seeds to continue
- Enforce a cooldown on cow milking and require feeding before milking again
- Production limits are randomized between a configurable minimum and maximum, varying with each feeding cycle
- Fully customizable messages for feeding, milking, cooldowns, and malnutrition warnings
  
**Mob Spawner Control**:
- Optionally disable mob spawners from spawning creatures entirely
- Prevent players from breaking spawners while allowing admins to bypass by sneaking
- Block spawner type conversion via spawn eggs
- Fully customizable warning messages for players and admins
- Optional custom spawner data and settings via a dedicated configuration file
  
**Piglin Bartering Farm Prevention**:
- Prevent dispensers and droppers from automatically feeding gold to piglins in the Nether
- Optionally require players to hand gold directly to piglins by disabling ground pickup

**Block Growth Control**:
- Prevent automatic growth of configurable blocks entirely
- Supports any growable block such as cactus, bamboo, kelp, and pointed dripstone and more
  
**Armadillo XP Farm Prevention**:
- Disable armadillos from getting infected to prevent XP farming

**Reloaded Improvements**

> Updated from the original AntiFarm by bagdydad with **bug fixes, optimizations, improvements and new features**.
